_comment: Agent/model config for the C verification pipeline. CLI flags override these; these override built-in defaults. Edit model names here instead of passing --model/--agent every run. Frequently-changed things (target, --only, budgets, --dry-run) stay as CLI flags.

models._comment: codex/claude = model per backend for ALL agent stages (contract, verify, eval, audit). consolidate = model for the end-of-flow experience unit.
